title: Developer Advocate
description:
Fastly's edge cloud platform serves content to 190 countries, with 99.99% uptime. We power the next generation of digital experiences at the edge.

We're seeking a Developer Advocate to join our Edge Computing team in Houston. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Create technical content (blogs, tutorials, videos) showcasing Fastly platform capabilities
Build and share code examples, SDKs, and developer tools with the community
Engage with developers at conferences, meetups, and online communities
Gather developer feedback and advocate for product improvements
Respond to technical questions and provide guidance on platform usage
Collaborate with product and engineering teams on developer experience

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent professional experience
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in software development, developer relations, or developer marketing
certifications: None required; public speaking or technical certification appreciated
